description:
GIVEN a user has SUBSCRIBERVOD entitlement
AND an SLIVE stream is in progress
AND the user selects the SLIVE stream to watch

steps.action: WHEN the user Rewinds the stream to the beginning
steps.result:
THEN Rewind stops once it reaches the start of the stream
AND playback resumes at the beginning of the stream
AND the elapsed time in the scrubber reflects the playhead position
